name: dear-ijeawele
description: Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie's 'Dear Ijeawele, or A Feminist Manifesto in Fifteen Suggestions' — 15 powerful suggestions for raising a feminist daughter, covering identity, culture, love, money, and freedom.
useCase: Raise confident, independent daughters who question the world, reject limiting gender roles, and grow into full people.
knownRisks: May challenge deeply held cultural/religious beliefs about gender roles
Written from a specific cultural perspective (Nigerian/Western educated)
